svg.aria-label: Roadmap from v0 (shipped) through v1 (propose and apply) to v2 (continuous healing) and v3 (federated colonies). Time-to-healthy trends from hours to seconds.

g.text: — the substrate exists and tells you the truth
— Colony stops printing commands and starts running them
— move the loop off the terminal entirely
— cross-repo memory sync, team substrates, opt-in pheromone exchange
local-first remains the default; bodies stay on disk unless explicitly synced
